languages.text: "Лорд-капитан". {n}В механическом голосе {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} Ферренца вам чудится дребезжащее раздражение.{/n} "Зафиксирована попытка саботажа эксплантации священных {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментов{/g}. Запрашиваю вмешательство наивысшего уровня для пресечения нежелательных последствий".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан". {n}В механическом голосе {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} Ферренца вам чудится дребезжащее раздражение.{/n} "Зафиксирована попытка саботажа эксплантации священных {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментов{/g}. Запрашиваю вмешательство наивысшего уровня для пресечения нежелательных последствий".

languages.text: "Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан". {n}В механическом голосе {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетора{/g} Ферренца вам чудится дребезжащее раздражение.{/n} "Зафиксирована попытка саботажа эксплантации священных {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментов{/g}. Запрашиваю вмешательство наивысшего уровня для пресечения нежелательных последствий".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."

"Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in Genetor Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred augments has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."

"Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in Genetor Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred augments has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."

languages.text: 「艦長様」{n}ジェネトル・フェレンツの機械的な声に、苛立ちの音が混じっている。{/n} 「聖なる強化装置への破壊工作が企てられている。望ましくない結果を避けるため、最高レベルの介入を要請する」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in Genetor Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred augments has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan." {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör{/g} Ferrenz'in mekanik sesindeki rahatsızlık tıkırtısını duyabiliyorsun.{/n} "Kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmentlere{/g} sabotaj girişimi tespit edildi. İstenmeyen sonuçları önlemek için en üst düzeyde müdahale talep ediliyor."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan." {n}Genetör Ferrenz'in mekanik sesindeki rahatsızlık tıkırtısını duyabiliyorsun.{/n} "Kutsal ogmentlere sabotaj girişimi tespit edildi. İstenmeyen sonuçları önlemek için en üst düzeyde müdahale talep ediliyor."

languages.text: “舰长大人。”{n}{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}费伦茨的机械嗓音中夹杂着恼怒的杂音。{/n}“检测到针对神圣{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}的蓄意妨碍行为。请求最高级别介入，以防事态恶化。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人。”{n}基因士费伦茨的机械嗓音中夹杂着恼怒的杂音。{/n}“检测到针对神圣植入物的蓄意妨碍行为。请求最高级别介入，以防事态恶化。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain." {n}Du erkennst die Verärgerung in der mechanischen Stimme von {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz.{/n} "Versuchte Sabotage heiliger {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} festgestellt. Erbitte Intervention auf höchster Ebene, um unerwünschte Konsequenzen zu verhindern."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain." {n}Du erkennst die Verärgerung in der mechanischen Stimme von Genetor Ferrenz.{/n} "Versuchte Sabotage heiliger Augmentationen festgestellt. Erbitte Intervention auf höchster Ebene, um unerwünschte Konsequenzen zu verhindern."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Vous décelez le tranchant métallique de l'irritation dans la voix mécanique du {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} Ferrenz.{/n} « Une tentative de sabotage des {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} sacrées a été détectée. Demandons intervention des plus hautes instances afin d'éviter des conséquences regrettables. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}. » {n}Vous décelez le tranchant métallique de l'irritation dans la voix mécanique du genetor Ferrenz.{/n} « Une tentative de sabotage des augmentations sacrées a été détectée. Demandons intervention des plus hautes instances afin d'éviter des conséquences regrettables. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán». {n}Oyes el tañido de la irritación en la voz mecánica del {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} Ferrenz.{/n} «Se ha detectado un intento de sabotaje de los {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumentos{/g} sagrados. Solicito intervención de máximo nivel para evitar consecuencias indeseables».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain." {n}You can hear the rattle of irritation in {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} Ferrenz's mechanical voice.{/n} "Attempted sabotage of sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} has been detected. Requesting intervention of the highest level to prevent undesirable consequences."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán». {n}Oyes el tañido de la irritación en la voz mecánica del genetor Ferrenz.{/n} «Se ha detectado un intento de sabotaje de los aumentos sagrados. Solicito intervención de máximo nivel para evitar consecuencias indeseables».
